typecheck.command: echo "No typecheck configured (pure Python, no mypy)"

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the build_sample() engagement_keys/creator_keys/media_keys declarative mapping pattern. Future adapter authors should know that new adapters specify field extraction via Mapping[str, Sequence[str]] parameters to build_sample(), not by manually constructing dataclasses.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature pipeline-schema-and-engagement introduced a generalized key-mapping pattern in _common.py:build_sample() that all 3 adapters now use identically. This is now a core convention but is not mentioned in AGENTS.md's Architecture & Conventions section.

rejectedObservations.observation: architecture.md in .factory/library/ mentions 'dashboard.json' as output file #6 but pack_runner.py only generates 5 files currently.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is intentional pre-documentation for the upcoming dashboard-output milestone feature (pipeline-dashboard-output). The architecture doc was written to reflect the planned end-state. Not an error.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed the skill procedure faithfully with no deviations.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Floating-point truncation in parse_chinese_number: int(base * 10000) truncates instead of rounding for 2+ decimal place inputs (e.g., '0.57万' → 5699 instead of 5700). Fix: use round() instead of int(). Does not affect common 1-decimal real-world data.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Change int(base * 10000) to round(base * 10000) and int(base * 1000) to round(base * 1000)

nonBlockingIssues.description: Missing adapter extraction tests for xhs_downloader and douyin_downloader. Only mediacrawler has extraction tests for engagement/creator/media fields. The other two adapters use the same build_sample() code path but with different field key mappings that could have mapping errors.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add extraction tests for xhs_downloader and douyin_downloader, enriching fixtures with engagement/creator/media fields.
